context.audience: Backend developers optimizing application performance, teams managing AI API costs through intelligent caching, architects designing scalable systems with multi-layer caching
pain_points: Designing cache invalidation strategies that balance freshness and performance
Caching AI/LLM responses to reduce API costs without serving stale results
Choosing between in-memory, distributed, and CDN caching layers
Implementing cache warming and precomputation for predictable performance
Debugging cache-related issues and monitoring cache hit rates in production
